items.title_en: Treasury yields rise ahead of key inflation data; markets resume trading after public holiday
items.title_zh: 在关键通胀数据公布之前，国债收益率上升；公众假期后市场恢复交易
items.desc_en: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 3 basis points to 4.483%.
items.desc_zh: 10 年期美国国债收益率（美国政府借款的主要基准）上涨超过 3 个基点，至 4.483%。

items.title_en: Dozens injured, 18 missing after blast during restart at giant Qatar LNG site
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔大型液化天然气工厂重启期间发生爆炸，造成数十人受伤、18人失踪
items.desc_en: Authorities said a 'technical accident' occurred at the Barzan local gas supply facility on Sunday evening and that there was no threat to public safety.
items.desc_zh: 当局表示，周日晚上，巴尔赞当地天然气供应设施发生了“技术事故”，公共安全没有受到威胁。

items.title_en: SpaceX stock drops again after rally following blockbuster IPO
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价在首次公开募股后反弹后再次下跌
items.desc_en: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.
items.desc_zh: 该公司 6 月 12 日破纪录的 IPO 后的涨势已经降温，过去两个交易日全天股价下跌。

items.title_en: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of U.S. firms in retaliation for Pentagon blacklist
items.title_zh: 中国对数十家美国公司实施贸易限制以报复五角大楼黑名单

items.desc_zh: 五角大楼本月早些时候更新了所谓的 1260H 名单，将大量中国科技公司添加到其认为帮助过北京军方的实体名单中。

items.desc_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉似乎以微弱优势击败了他的竞争对手伊万·塞佩达，后者表示初步统计“尚未正式或具有约束力”。

items.title_en: Largest ever cocaine bust in Australia after police raid underground bunker
items.title_zh: 警方突袭地下掩体后，澳大利亚破获有史以来最大规模的可卡因
items.desc_en: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
items.desc_zh: 警方在搜查悉尼西部的一处房产后，查获了 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计 8.16 亿澳元。

items.title_en: After Trump inspects Reflecting Pool, he says repair work will begin 'immediately'
items.title_zh: 特朗普视察倒影池后表示修复工作将“立即”开始
items.desc_en: On Sunday, the president flew by helicopter over the refurbished landmark, which is plagued by algae and peeling paint. He claims vandals are partly to blame.
items.desc_zh: 周日，总统乘坐直升机飞越这座经过翻新的地标建筑，该地标建筑饱受藻类和油漆剥落的困扰。他声称破坏者负有部分责任。

items.title_en: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯军队集结威胁被视为夺取乌克兰顿巴斯关键的城市
items.desc_en: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
items.desc_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。

items.title_en: Cape Verde fan goes wild live on BBC News as his country scores
items.title_zh: 佛得角球迷在 BBC 新闻节目中疯狂直播，因为他的国家得分
items.desc_en: During a live BBC News broadcast, reporter Paul Njie interviews a Cape Verde fan when the country suddenly scores its first ever World Cup goal against Uruguay in the 2026 World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 在 BBC 新闻直播中，记者 Paul Njie 采访了一名佛得角球迷，当时佛得角在 2026 年世界杯对阵乌拉圭的比赛中突然攻入了世界杯首个进球。

items.title_en: The BTS fans losing thousands as scammers cash in on comeback tour ticket war
items.title_zh: 防弹少年团粉丝因复出巡演门票战中诈骗而损失数千美元
items.desc_en: As ticket demand outstrips supply by a ratio of 15 to one, desperate fans have become easy targets.
items.desc_zh: 由于门票供不应求的比例为 15 比 1，绝望的球迷很容易成为目标。

items.desc_zh: 由于华尔街等待美联储密切关注的通胀数据发布，美国股指期货周日走低。

items.title_zh: 皮克斯的《玩具总动员 5》创下系列历史上最大的首周末票房收入 1.6 亿美元
items.desc_en: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.

items.title_en: US and Iran begin talks on initial peace deal in Switzerland
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在瑞士开始就初步和平协议进行谈判
items.desc_en: The face-to-face meeting follows ongoing fighting in Lebanon and Iran's claim to have shut the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 此次面对面会议是在黎巴嫩持续战斗以及伊朗声称已关闭霍尔木兹海峡之后举行的。

items.title_en: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
items.title_zh: 提高最低工资是一个巨大的政治赢家。现在遇到了阻力
items.desc_en: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.
items.desc_zh: 提高最低工资一直是投票箱中进步政策的赢家，但最近的失败表明经济情绪放缓了其政治势头。

items.title_en: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.desc_en: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.desc_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title_en: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
items.title_zh: 印度学生因涉嫌试卷泄露而重新接受体检，安保严密
items.desc_en: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.
items.desc_zh: 由于部署了空军来保护试卷，数百万考生面临生物识别检查和搜身。

items.title_en: Dutch royals enjoy two big results in one World Cup day
items.title_zh: 荷兰皇室在世界杯的一天内取得了两项重大成果
items.desc_en: There may be about 5,000 miles between the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao but members of the Dutch royal family managed to see both sides play on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 荷兰与其前殖民地库拉索岛之间可能相距约 5,000 英里，但荷兰王室成员设法观看了双方周六的比赛。

items.title_en: Former Olympian denies vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool after arrest
items.title_zh: 前奥运选手被捕后否认破坏华盛顿倒影池

items.desc_zh: 戴维·赫恩 (Davey Hearn) 表示，他只是出于好奇而触摸现场的新油漆，并没有去除或改变它。

items.title_en: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_en: Why the social media ban is about so much more than social media
items.title_zh: 为什么社交媒体禁令的意义远不止社交媒体
items.desc_en: If we are witnessing a profound shift in the online space, how will it reshape our relationship with it? Technology and AI editor Zoe Kleinman writes.
items.desc_zh: 如果我们目睹网络空间的深刻转变，它将如何重塑我们与网络的关系？技术和人工智能编辑 Zoe Kleinman 写道。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列空袭导致加沙六人死亡，其中包括半岛电视台摄影师
items.desc_en: The Israeli military accused Ahmed Wishah of being a "Hamas sniper operative", without providing evidence.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方指责艾哈迈德·维沙是“哈马斯狙击手”，但没有提供证据。

items.title_en: Notchkin
items.title_zh: Notchkin
items.desc_en: A notes app that lives in your MacBook's notch.
items.desc_zh: 一款内置于 MacBook 中的笔记应用程序。

items.title_en: The budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway
items.title_zh: 美国的廉价航空公司模式即将耗尽跑道
items.desc_en: Spirit's bankruptcy as United and Delta fly high suggests there's more to success in airline industry than low fares, and failure isn't about jet fuel spikes.
items.desc_zh: 随着联合航空和达美航空的飞速发展，精神航空破产，这表明航空业的成功不仅仅在于低票价，而失败与航空燃油飙升无关。

items.title_en: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
items.title_zh: SNAP 限制可能会改变购物者的购买方式——食品巨头正在关注
items.desc_en: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.
items.desc_zh: SNAP 食品限制正在蔓延到更多州，随着消费者将支出从苏打水、糖果和加工食品上转移，主要食品和饮料面临压力。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs is betting that a recent merger will drive sharp gains for this travel stock
items.title_zh: 高盛押注最近的合并将推动这只旅游股票大幅上涨
items.desc_en: The bank this week upgraded the airline to buy from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该银行本周将航空公司的评级从“中性”上调至“买入”。

items.title_en: African and Caribbean nations call for formal apology for transatlantic slavery
items.title_zh: 非洲和加勒比国家呼吁对跨大西洋奴隶制正式道歉
items.desc_en: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.
items.desc_zh: 领导人要求从奴隶贸易中受益的国家道歉，并要求减免债务和经济补偿。

items.title_en: New video game console aims to get kids moving
items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来
items.desc_en: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
items.desc_zh: 这款立方体形状的游戏机将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.title_en: The artificial ice pyramids saving India's mountain villages
items.title_zh: 人造冰金字塔拯救了印度的山村
items.desc_en: Himalayan villages are creating artificial glaciers to guarantee water for their crops in the spring.
items.desc_zh: 喜马拉雅山的村庄正在建造人工冰川，以保证春季农作物的用水。

items.desc_zh: 开发商表示，这款备受期待的游戏将于 6 月 25 日开始预售。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。
